_meta.description: humanize-en detector rules. M3 ships ~16 lexical + phrase rules. M4 adds structural + rhythm + fake_human + soul_signals.
sources: HC3-English mining (scripts/mine_rule_candidates.py) — AI/human ratio on 57k human + 27k ChatGPT answers
Liang et al. arXiv:2403.07183 — 'The delve paper': post-RLHF lexical tells (delve, meticulous, realm, intricate, ...)
Plain English Campaign A-Z of alternative words (public domain, http://www.plainenglish.co.uk/files/alternative.pdf) — corporate filler
GPTZero public methodology — meta-comments and structural transitions
Stanford 'Hallmarks of AI text' analyses — uniform sentence length + transition density

scoring.weight_scale: Hits scored as: count*weight*0.5 if count<=soft_threshold; count*weight if soft<count<=hard; (count-hard)*weight added on top once hard exceeded.
scoring.normalization: Total = min(100, sum(rule_scores) / max(1, len(text)/3000)). Length-normalised so a 12k-word essay isn't auto-flagged.

blacklist_words._desc: Single-word AI tells. Each rule sums hits across all patterns and applies the (soft, hard) threshold ladder.

abstract_possessives._desc: ChatGPT loves abstract subject's-X constructions. HC3 ratio 23-100x. (e.g. 'the body's natural defense', 'the country's economy')

ai_hedging_adverbs._desc: Vacuous hedge adverbs. HC3 ratio 7-12x. Each rare; many together = AI scaffolding.

ai_categorical_nouns._desc: Vague catch-all nouns used to enumerate without committing. HC3 ratio 6-11x.

liang_2024_lexical_tells._desc: Post-RLHF lexical signature of GPT-4 / Claude (Liang 2024 arXiv:2403.07183 Tables 2-3). Rare in HC3 (early-2023 GPT-3.5) but diagnostic in current AI text.

corporate_filler._desc: Corporate-speak verbs flagged by Plain English Campaign. Each is a one-word smell of management consulting.

ai_amplifiers._desc: Vacuous strengtheners. Real writers cut these; ChatGPT sprinkles them. HC3 ratio 3-5x.

hollow_grand_claims._desc: Marketing-grade superlatives. Almost never appear in human casual writing.

blacklist_phrases._desc: Multi-word AI tells. Patterns are matched case-insensitively as word-boundary-anchored substrings. Hit accumulation follows the same soft/hard threshold ladder as blacklist_words.

meta_hedge._desc: Meta-comments about what the writer is about to say. The single strongest AI tell. HC3 phrase ratio 80-330x. (Liang 2024 + GPTZero methodology.)
patterns: i would like to point out

structural_summary._desc: Closing-paragraph scaffold. Each is fine once; together they signal AI essay template.

structural_transitions._desc: Heavy use of explicit transitions. The n-gram engine also measures transition_density — this rule fires interpretably on the worst offenders so the polish prompt can target them by name.

ai_safety_disclaimer._desc: Verbatim ChatGPT safety boilerplate. Even one is a near-certain AI signature; weight is set so a single hit produces a HIGH score on its own.
patterns: it's important to note that i

reflexive_helpers._desc: Soft-pedalled advice scaffolding. HC3 ratio 3-9x (especially in finance/medicine subsets).
patterns: can be a great way to
is one of the best ways

exemplar_padding._desc: Padding phrases that promise examples without committing to specifics.
patterns: such as but not limited to

generic_caveat._desc: Non-answer fallbacks. ChatGPT uses these to look comprehensive without giving advice.
patterns: depending on a variety of factors
depends on a number of factors
depending on a number of factors

enumeration_padding._desc: Listing scaffolds. Real writers say 'three things' or just list; ChatGPT prefaces.

important_to_X._desc: The all-purpose 'important to / essential to / crucial to' scaffold. HC3 3-gram ratio 90-100x for the literal phrase.

structural_rules._desc: M4 will add structural hard-constraint checks (e.g. paragraph-opening diversity, list-density). M3 leaves this empty.

rhythm_rules._desc: M4 will add sentence-length CV gates beyond what the n-gram engine surfaces. M3 leaves this empty.

fake_human._desc: M4 will add fake-personal-experience detectors. M3 leaves this empty.

soul_signals._desc: M4 will add argumentation-quality signals (contrarian view, concrete object, named source). M3 leaves this empty.
